definition: The fourth noble truth, concerning the path leading to quenching.
notes: This record names the path-side truth while pointing readers back to the governed magga headword and the practical course language of patipada when the line needs that explanatory surface.

example_phrases.translation: this is the noble truth of the path of practice leading to the quenching of dissatisfaction
example_phrases.notes: Shows the canonical naming line for the fourth truth.
